Application For Default Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant To Default Previously Entered Herein On April 21, 2014 (Local Rule 6.5c)
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Plaintiff RAFAEL A. FLORES, Esq., appearing on his own behalf.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JULIO A. GUEVARA
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Rafael A. Flores sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $42,690.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $450.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $43,140.00
Judgment signed in open court.
